## Validation

<!-- Paste the commands you ran and their result. -->

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm lint
pnpm vitest --run
pnpm build
```

## Risk

- [ ] This change preserves local-first handling for sensitive user content.
- [ ] UI copy is Persian-first where user-facing.
- [ ] Security/privacy impact was reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated or this change does not need docs.
- [ ] Commits include a `Signed-off-by` trailer.
- [ ] Licensing impact was reviewed.
